name: Fixture Asset Metadata
description: Valid read-only asset metadata plugin for the fixture pack.

validationHints: pivot must be center or bottom
assetMetadata.boundary: Declarative read-only asset metadata descriptor with no asset generation, no command execution, and no network access.

boundary: Declarative read-only plugin manifest; allowlisted descriptors only, with no executable code, no command execution, and no network install.
